name: Bandung
cutscene: The train climbs up into the cool, green highlands.
This is Bandung, the heart of Sunda, all mist and music.
Go find what these mountains are proud of.

objects.name: Angklung
objects.mission: Frame the bamboo rattle tuned to one note

objects.name: Tea Picker's Basket
objects.mission: Capture the basket that gathers highland leaves

objects.name: Gedung Sate
objects.mission: Find the building crowned with a satay skewer

dialog.speaker: Guide
lines: The old hall wears that satay skewer on top like a crown.
Six ornaments up there. One for every year it took to build.
The afternoon light's coming down the arches. It's waiting for you.
